abilities.name: Final Preparations
abilities.text: During the end phase, this model may drain two (soulstone) to have an ally within 6" declare the Interact action.

abilities.name: Insatiable
abilities.text: When this model activates, if it has a Hunger token, enemy models within (aura)3" are dealt 1 damage. This model heals 1 for each damage suffered.

abilities.name: Shared Vein
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, reduce that damage by 1 if this model is within 1" of another ally.

actions.name: Devour
actions.effects: This model may gain a Hunger token. If it does so, the target must discard a random card.

triggers.name: Death's Door
triggers.text: The target gains an Incurable token.

triggers.name: Bloody Tithe
triggers.text: This model may either heal 2 or remove a Hunger token.

actions.name: Bloodthirst Rite
actions.effects: Target gains Stunned and Hunger tokens.

triggers.name: Enthrall
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Faith in the Flesh
triggers.text: An ally within 4" gains an Insight token.

triggers.name: Called by Blood
triggers.text: Move the target up to 4". Then, all allies within (t)1" of the target may remove a Hunger token.

actions.name: Judgment's Wake
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a friendly Marathine model, ignoring range and LoS.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5". Then, make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Bloodbound
triggers.text: Immediately, place the target within 1" of this model.
